<div class="page-title-block">
# Photography
</div>


<div class="album-grid">

<a href="photos/vilnius.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/vilnius/cover.jpg)
<span>Vilnius</span>
</a>

<a href="photos/paris.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/paris/cover.jpg)
<span>Paris</span>
</a>

<a href="photos/boston.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/boston/cover.jpg)
<span>Boston</span>
</a>

<a href="photos/lviv.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/lviv/cover.jpg)
<span>Lviv</span>
</a>

<a href="photos/istanbul.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/istanbul/cover.jpg)
<span>Istanbul</span>
</a>

<a href="photos/mumbai.html" class="album-card">
![](/photos/mumbai/cover.jpg)
<span>Mumbai</span>
</a>

</div>
